16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, cross detail, cute but purposeful.

Scene: Avilia organizes an image generation run into a neat archive folder. Separate paper slips labeled "prompt_snapshot", "size", "model", "input image", "output image", and "elapsed time" slide into a folder stamped ".meta.json". A small finished image thumbnail and a prompt text sheet sit nearby, connected by thin red threads to the archive.

Core meaning: generated images become traceable assets when prompt snapshots and metadata are saved.

Style: clean Chinese technical blog illustration, white background, black lines, dark red accents, very small blue status dots, lots of breathing room. Minimal handwritten Chinese labels: "可追溯", "复盘", "记录".

Avoid dense tables, avoid PPT, avoid lots of text, avoid character-only portrait.
